project_type: Monorepo with Python FastAPI backend + React frontend SPA
build_system: pip/pyproject.toml for backend, npm for frontend, Docker for full build
build_command: cd backend && pip install -e . (or pip install -r requirements.txt)
verification_instructions: 1. Install backend deps: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. Run: python -m pytest tests/ -v. 3. Start server: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 5000. 4. Test login: curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@institute.com","password":"admin123"}'
setup_instructions: 1. pyenv local 3.11.15. 2. python -m venv venv. 3. source venv/bin/activate. 4. pip install -r requirements.txt. 5. python seed.py (to seed SQLite DB)
environment_constraints: Python 3.11.15 available via pyenv. OPEN_INTERNET mode - can install packages from PyPI. SQLite for database (same as before).
contribution_requirements: All API endpoints must remain identical to existing Node.js backend. Response format: {success: bool, data?: T, message?: str, error?: str}. Paginated responses: {success: bool, data: T, total: int, page: int, limit: int, totalPages: int}. Frontend must NOT be modified.
key_patterns: Response helpers: success(data, message, status_code), error(message, status_code), paginated(data, total, page, limit). JWT auth with Bearer token. Role-based access: ADMIN, TRAINER, COUNSELLOR, STUDENT. File uploads stored in backend/uploads/ with UUID filenames. QR attendance with HMAC tokens. PDF export via pdfkit, Excel export via exceljs (Python equivalents: reportlab/fpdf and openpyxl).
relevant_files: backend/src/routes/index.ts - route structure and role guards
directory_structure: Institute-ERP/ root with backend/ (to be rewritten in Python), frontend/ (React SPA, keep as-is), Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, package.json (root workspace scripts). Backend has: routes (14 files), services (5 files), middleware (3 files), prisma schema with 17 models, seed script, tests (4 test files).
